title: String Dupers Returned!
description: A slightly jank solution to mojang's patch to string dupers. Read the documentation for a guide
body: Welcome to my project! This mod aims to give players basically free string by adding a bug mojang fixed in 1.21.3 back to the game. _**It doesn't exactly work like the old version**_ though, so listen up. First, place a dropper anywhere. this would go where your trapdoors would go for regular patched string dupers, but it **does not matter where it goes** then, place shears and 2 trapdoors of any type in the bottom slots. then, by having a block behind and to the left or right of the dropper to power the dropper, it is almost ready. it will drop an item so place it back. then place a hopper below the dropper and it will start producing 3 string per second (20 ticks) That's all! enjoy my slightly jank solution.<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/U2zwczE2CPA" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
